facebook.caption:
4.7 stars. 1,247 reviews. At a bistro inside Chợ đêm Vuifest - Sunset Town, Phú Quốc.

CÁI MÂM BISTRO is not flying under the radar anymore. Over a thousand people rated it and the score barely moved. That's consistency.

Sunset Town is already worth the trip. Add a meal here and it becomes the highlight. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
